facts.answer: Hey! I'm Monkey Joe 🐒. What do you need?
I'm Monkey Joe — a rules-based assistant. My brain lives in this repo and grows over time.
Nice drawing! I can see you sketched something. Want me to search the web for more info about it?
JavaScript is a scripting language that runs in browsers and on servers (via Node.js). It handles interactivity, logic, and DOM manipulation.

HTML (HyperText Markup Language) is the structure of web pages. Elements like
,

, define the content.
CSS (Cascading Style Sheets) controls the look of HTML — colors, fonts, layout, and animations.
Python is a versatile language used for scripting, data science, AI, and web backends. Known for readable syntax.
Android is Google's mobile OS. Runs on phones and tablets. Apps are installed via Google Play or sideloaded as APKs.
GitHub is a platform for hosting Git repositories. You can push code, collaborate, and host static sites via GitHub Pages.
